_doc: Curated station-coordinate corrections applied on top of the GENERATED base (official İBB Metro İstanbul API + İBB GeoJSON + OSM route relations; see build.mjs). These are NOT invented/hard-coded data: each entry overrides a PROVABLY-WRONG upstream coordinate with a more authoritative, cited source. Keep this file small and audited — every entry must carry `source`, `verified`, and `reason`. build.mjs warns if the count grows past its review cap or if an entry matches no station (stale → delete it). Matched by `slug(name.tr)` + `anyLine` membership so a pin survives id/clustering changes. `snap:true` projects the coord onto the nearest point ON the line so a mid-line dot stays on the track (no zigzag).

pins.reason: Marmaray/T6 Sirkeci; the official operator position differs from the OSM node.
T1 tram Sirkeci is a physically separate platform from the Marmaray/T6 stop.
Halkalı interchange hub; operator position differs from OSM.
M3 İncirli; operator position differs from OSM.
M3 Haznedar mid-line station; snapped to the centerline to avoid a zigzag.
Base dot sat ~169 m off the real M8 platform (İBB point was itself offset).
Base dot sat ~171 m off the real M9 platform.
Base dot sat ~212 m off the real M4 platform (İBB point was itself offset).
